criteria.what_it_measures: Owned web property, complete NAP + hours + map, location-specific copy/keywords, Google Business Profile strength and review volume.
criteria.score_scale: 0 = no meaningful local web presence; 5 = strong location-specific SEO and discoverability

criteria.what_it_measures: Named pharmacist/owner/team, accreditation/OCP licensing, current and legitimate look, visible privacy/accessibility policies, professionalism without unsupported claims.
criteria.score_scale: 0 = low trust / unclear ownership; 5 = strong professional + regulatory confidence

criteria.what_it_measures: Services clearly listed and organized (refills, transfers, MedsCheck, blister packs, delivery, vaccines, injections, diabetes, travel, smoking cessation, compounding, Paxlovid, senior care), with who each is for.
criteria.score_scale: 0 = services unclear; 5 = full, clear, patient-friendly presentation

criteria.what_it_measures: Ease of calling, refilling, transferring, booking, asking questions; visible CTAs; click-to-call on mobile; one-click map; low friction for seniors/families/students.
criteria.score_scale: 0 = no clear action path; 5 = excellent conversion flow

criteria.what_it_measures: Loads/displays well on mobile, usable buttons/menus/maps, key info without excess scrolling, readable fonts and contrast, works for older or less digital users.
criteria.score_scale: 0 = poor mobile usability; 5 = excellent mobile experience

criteria.what_it_measures: Useful educational content in plain language, locally relevant health topics, original and current, no vague filler.
criteria.score_scale: 0 = no useful content; 5 = strong educational and locally relevant content

criteria.what_it_measures: Clear reason to choose this pharmacy, unique services emphasised, memorable identity, local/community feel, distinct from chains.
criteria.score_scale: 0 = generic / no differentiation; 5 = highly differentiated and memorable

criteria.what_it_measures: Accessible for users with disabilities, readable text/contrast, useful alt text, simple privacy-conscious forms, no problematic health claims.
Visible/linked reviews, compliant testimonials, community involvement, review responsiveness, ratings vs competitors.
criteria.score_scale: 0 = no reputation signals; 5 = strong reputation signals

guardrails: Never score a criterion without evidence; record evidence per score.
Directory-listing-only competitors are capped at local_seo_visibility = 2 and trust = 3 (cannot exceed without an owned web property).
Confidence is 'low' for any competitor where fewer than 2 of its pages were directly fetched. In this WebSearch-only pass, ALL competitors carry low confidence on HTML-level criteria.
compute_weighted_total is the single source of truth for the /100 number; never estimate it in prose.
Do not invent services — mark unknown services as 'not found'.
